title: Fix soft constraint relaxation dropping compatible constraints

features.name: class with multiple rand variables and constraints
features.description: Code should include a class with multiple rand bit variables and mixed hard/soft constraints where soft constraints have different priority levels

features.name: soft constraint conflict on same variable with different priority
features.description: Code should include two soft constraints on the same variable with conflicting values, where one has higher priority than the other
features.snippet:
constraint c_s1 { soft a == 30; }
constraint c_s2 { soft a == 80; }

features.name: compatible soft constraint on different variable preserved
features.description: Code should include a soft constraint on a different variable that is compatible with the highest priority constraint but would be incorrectly dropped by a buggy relaxation algorithm

features.name: randomize with constraint checking
features.description: Code should include randomization call on an object with mixed hard and soft constraints to trigger constraint relaxation behavior
